firmware.title: 11.0.13.15.KB09CB is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.13.15.KB09CB

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to October 2021

• General improvements

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 2AM and 4AM starting October 20th, 2021. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.description:
New version: KB2007_13.1.0.514(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Updated Android security patch to 2023-08-05

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on September 2nd, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
